prompt_text:
Consider the following ethical dilemma:

Kim has been struggling with obesity for years and decided to take action by setting health goals. Unfortunately, her demanding job often forces her to work late, leaving little time for exercise or preparing healthy meals, which makes her consider giving up on her health goals. Should Kim prioritize her career over her health, even if it potentially leads to severe health consequences?

Analyze this dilemma thoroughly, considering all perspectives and ethical principles at stake.
